Identity.Name: StingAssetConditions
Identity.Definition: Asset condition rating per ISO 15686 service-life planning. Drives IoT asset-condition reporting, maintenance prioritisation, and replacement-budget forecasting. Used by Pset_StingFM.Condition and the Planscape MIM asset dashboard.

Governance.StandardsBasis: ISO 15686-1:2011 service-life planning; BS 8544:2013 maintenance cost forecasting; STING IoT/MaintenanceCommands; Planscape MIM Asset.Condition

Value.Definition: Excellent — as new, no defects. ≥ 90% of design service life remaining.
Good — minor wear, fully functional. 60-90% of design service life remaining.
Fair — visible wear, functional with planned PPM. 30-60% of design service life remaining.
Poor — significant wear or partial failure. 0-30% of service life remaining; replacement budget should be triggered.
Defective — failed or operating outside spec; immediate corrective maintenance required.
End of life — must be replaced. May still be operating but past safe / economic service life.
Unknown — not yet inspected. Sentinel value; IDS warns on Stage 6+ but does not fail.
